title: Volume-pod hot-store: stage >=15GB weight files to the container disk (the MPI-191 fix)
description: THE MPI-191 fix. Live-proven 2026-07-05 (same-pod A/B): the LTX stage-1->stage-2 gap on volume Pods = re-reading the 40GB transformer from the network volume (dd 750MB/s) every re-fault; cp to container disk collapsed the warm gap 36s->9s, warm full 81s->47s, cold 280s->128s. Design settled with the user: SIZE-THRESHOLD not model-name (any weight file >=~15GB stages to disk on first use — Q8 22GB paid the same tax, small models never did); STICKY (one copy per pod lifetime, no re-copy between gens, evict only on real space pressure, LRU); volume stays the durable library (survives pod deletion, avoids 10MB/s internet re-downloads). Needs container-disk bump 50->~80GB for volume pods (remotePodLifecycle.js:138; $0.007->$0.011/hr). Implementation home: wrapper (has install/manifest/progress-SSE machinery) + start.sh/extra-paths ordering + app preflight via resolveDeps. Read plan.md + the SOLVED banner in docs/builder/research/pod-perf-investigation.md BEFORE implementing — do NOT re-run acquitted axes (wrapper/nodes/flags/torch/ComfyUI-version).
